title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #11, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #11, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All our battleships are deployed elsewhere!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's the Code of the nearest Base!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Reinforce-ments are coming from the both division.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is South Blue, confirm your position.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to the Grand Line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My duty to protect Strawhat boy

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll watch over Luffy until he receivers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't stop him!! Strawhat!! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I want to see him right away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is the Isle of Women.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: More importantly, sister, you must eat!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #11, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past.
